summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GAAIUS AI Priority 1 fixes. Backend APIs working well (87.5% success rate), frontend fixes verified successfully. All major Priority 1 issues resolved: watermark removed, build page navigation fixed, ad banner logic working, profile access functional, projects page working without freezing.

minor_bugs.details: HuggingFace TTS service issue - external dependency problem
Temporary external service capacity issue, not a code problem

passed_tests: Watermark removal - No 'Made with Emergent' elements found
Build page branding - Shows 'GAAIUS AI Builder' instead of 'Vibe Coder'
Build page navigation - 'Back to Dashboard' button exists and works
Ad banner logic - Shows for logged-out users, hidden for logged-in users
Profile access - Profile modal opens correctly from sidebar
Projects page - Loads without freezing, create/list functionality works
Auth flow - Login/register working with test credentials
File generation - PDF and DOCX generation working
Audio narration - Narration generation endpoint working
Chat functionality - Basic chat with Groq working
Image generation - Pollinations AI integration working

success_percentage.backend: 87.5% (14/16 tests passed - 2 failures due to external service issues)
